case_title: WON, JI HYUNG vs. LEE,JOO HEE INDIV.& DBA KAJU FOODS & TRADING CO. et al

docket_entries.description: ANSWER TO COMPLAINT FILED BY DEFENDANT LEE,JOO HEE INDIV.& DBA KAJU FOODS & TRADING CO. LEE, SUN NAM IND DBA KAJU FOODS & TRADING COMPANY

M4/#504, COMM SUE KAPLAN, CSR L NAJERA, CLK H HAMILTON 0940: CASE CALLED FOR PROVE UP. PETER HAAS FOR PLAINTIFF JI HYUNG WON, (NOT WONG) WHO IS PRESENT, WITH KOREAN INTERPRETER MICHELLE CHU. MS. CHU IS SWORN. 0941: PLAINTIFF'S WITNESS JI HYUNG WON SWORN. DIRECT EXAMINATION BY MR. HAAS. 0942: PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBIT 1 FOR ID, LEASE AGREEMENT 0943: PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBIT 2 FOR ID, 30 DAY NOTICE 0948: PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS 1 & 2 IN EVIDENCE. 0947: PLAINTIFF'S WITNESS TONY WON SWORN. DIRECT EXAMINATION BY MR. HAAS. 0950: COURT GIVES JUDGMENT FOR PLAINTIFF FOR RESTITUTION OF THE PREMISES AT 2000 JUDAH ST, S.F, LEASE AGREEMENT FORFEITED. NO AWARD OF MONETARY DAMAGES, PLAINTIFF'S COUNSEL TO PREPARE JUDGMENT INDICATING THAT PLAINTIFF REQUESTS THE RIGHT TO FURTHER REQUEST DAMAGES AS INDICATED IN PRAYER 3 OF COMPLAINT. COSTS PER COST MEMORANDUM.
ORDER AFTER HEARING ON PLTF'S MOTION FOR ATTORNEYS' FEES AND COSTS

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT LEE,JOO HEE INDIV.& DBA KAJU FOODS & TRADING CO. CHA, SUN NAM ALSO KNOWN AS SUN NAM LEE IND AND DBA KAJU FOODS & TRADING COMPANY THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 2000 JUDAH ST. S.F. $9,347.50 ATTORNEY FEES, $1,090.08 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $10,437.58, LEASE FORFEITED, DAMAGES RESERVED FOR A SEPARATE ACTION INCLUDING PAST RENT, LATE PAYMENT CHARGES, INTEREST, PROPERTY DAMAGE, ATTORNEY FE ES AND COSTS, EXCEPT UD FEES & COSTS PER MEMORANDUM OF COSTS
